title: selaginella rupestris f. montanensis
intro: Selaginella rupestris f. montanensis, also known as the mountain spikemoss, is a species of plant in the genus Selaginella, a group of small, club moss-like plants that are native to mountainous regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, and has been used to treat various health conditions, including arthritis and other inflammatory diseases. The health benefits of Selaginella rupestris f. montanensis include reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and antioxidant protection, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Selaginella rupestris f. montanensis can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to promote overall health and well-being.
